verdict_reason: All three Sanskrit properties (avyakta, acintya, avikārya) are preserved as distinct in the engineering analog. Shankara's deductive-chain reading (beyond-senses → beyond-thought → beyond-change) appears in the cumulative structure of the engineering analog. Ramanuja's kind-distinction reading (the Self is different in kind from the objects pramāṇas manifest, hence inconceivable, hence unchangeable) appears in 'specification consists of what persists across implementations, not what any single implementation embodies.' The therefore-clause (tasmād evaṁ viditvā) is preserved as the operational close: knowing the layer your work sits at, perform no mourning ritual. Both readings are flagged in disagreements_among_translators and not conflated. The verse's specifically anti-grief instruction is preserved without being reduced to 'detachment from work in general' — the tradition says specifically that grief at the body-layer is misplaced because the Self is at a different layer; the analog says specifically that grief at the implementation-layer is misplaced because the contract is at a different layer. Same structure. PASS.
